---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

::::::::::::::::::: eg-page
:::: {#hero .eg-hero .eg-hero-tint-dark .eg-hero-center .eg-hero-middle style="--eg-hero-img:url('images/nrkGraze.jpg');"}
::: eg-wrap


## Let's transform landscapes together.

[Whether you're protecting a forest, verifying carbon, or planning for what comes next, we'd love to hear what you're working on.]{.eg-lede}
:::
::::



:::::: {#invite .eg-section .eg-invite}
::::: eg-wrap
::: eg-invite-copy
[Get in touch]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Let's talk about which layers of analysis apply to you, and what it would take to get you decision-ready intelligence you can act on.

:::
:::::
::::::



:::::: {#contact-form .eg-section .eg-contact-form}
::::: eg-wrap
::: eg-sec-head
[Reach us directly]{.eg-eyebrow}

## Send us a brief
:::

:::: eg-contact-form-grid

::: eg-contact-form-card

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mrevavwz" method="POST">

<div class="eg-form-row">
<label for="name" class="form-label">Name</label>
<input type="text" class="custom-input" id="name" name="name" required>
</div>

<div class="eg-form-row">
<label for="email" class="form-label">Email</label>
<input type="email" class="custom-input" id="email" name="email" required>
</div>

<div class="eg-form-row">
<label for="organization" class="form-label">Organization <span class="eg-form-hint">(optional)</span></label>
<input type="text" class="custom-input" id="organization" name="organization">
</div>

<div class="eg-form-row">
<label for="message" class="form-label">Tell us about your landscape</label>
<textarea class="custom-input" id="message" name="message" rows="5" required></textarea>
</div>

<!-- Anti-spam: keeps the subject line clean and silently drops bot submissions -->
<input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="New inquiry — Prime Geospatial website">
<input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

<div class="eg-form-row g-recaptcha" data-sitekey="YOUR_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY"></div>

<button type="submit" class="eg-btn eg-btn-solid">Send us a brief</button>

</form>

<script src="https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js" async defer></script>

:::

::: eg-contact-form-info
## Prefer to skip the form?

[EMAIL]{.eg-mono-label}

[hello\@equatorgeospatial.com](mailto:hello@equatorgeospatial.com){.eg-email}

[BASED IN]{.eg-mono-label}

[Nairobi, Kenya — serving East Africa]{.eg-email-sub}

:::

::::
:::::
::::::

:::::::::::::::::::
